name: Pure Golf Lab
about: Pure Golf Lab is an indoor golf facility offering a premium technology-focused environment for golfers of all skill levels. The venue is equipped with Foresight Falcon Launch Monitors, FSX Play Software, and Swing Catalyst cameras and balance plates for detailed swing analysis. It maintains a small, exclusive membership capped at 30 to ensure ample open time slots for members. The facility provides a simple, golf-centric atmosphere with a focus on serious practice and game improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: High-precision Foresight launch monitor technology for accurate data
Private, time-slot booked sessions with no interruptions
Professional coaching with immediate video swing feedback
Limited membership ensures access and availability
Variety of 45 world-renowned golf courses to play

food_and_drink.notes: Members can bring their own snacks; venue has a fridge for storage
No mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end radar launch monitor with FSX Play Software

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is not explicitly stated whether clubs are provided. Members likely use their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, members can bring their own snacks. The facility has a fridge for storage.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify the duration for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers one-hour lessons specifically for youth ages 12-18, with a parent or guardian's attendance required.
